dialogue.speaker: KYLE
dialogue.line: "We're running out of time, Maya. Our source just confirmed that the data disk has been sold to a rival corporation."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KYLE, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: MAYA
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, Kyle. I'll track down that disk. I have a lead on a underground market."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KYLE, frustration evident on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KYLE
dialogue.line: "Be careful, Maya. We don't know what we're up against."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, her eyes scanning the room with intensity.

dialogue.speaker: MAYA
dialogue.line: "Alright, I think I found the seller. He's a known associate of the rival corporation."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KYLE
dialogue.line: "And what's the plan, Maya? You're not going in alone."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of MAYA, her voice low and confident.

dialogue.speaker: MAYA
dialogue.line: "I have a buyer lined up. I'll make the exchange and then we can take down the rival corporation."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KYLE, his eyes scanning the market with a mixture of concern and curiosity.

dialogue.speaker: MAYA
dialogue.line: "Alright, Kyle. Let's get this over with."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KYLE
dialogue.line: "You stay behind me. I've got your back."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of MAYA, her eyes locked on the warehouse entrance.

dialogue.speaker: MAYA
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KYLE, his voice steady and reassuring.
